'''鈭歯-t-z-b''' ('''kanatzeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bravado|bravado]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bravado|bravado]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-t-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kanatzeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
